title: aspilia helianthoides subsp. prieureana
intro: Aspilia helianthoides subsp. prieureana is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a medicinal herb. It is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Aspilia helianthoides subsp. prieureana include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments.
